\tzpentry{ID4521}{Semantic Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4521 introduces Semantic Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$F_{\text{semantic}} > 1 - 1/N_{\max}^{\pi}$
\]
